name: Gujerati-Style Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the beans and cut into 1-inch lengths.
2. Blanch the beans in boiling water for about 30 seconds, then drain and rinse immediately in cold water.
3. Set aside.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. When hot, add the mustard seeds.
- When the mustard seeds begin to pop, add the garlic and stir until they start to darken.
5. Add the chili and stir for a few seconds.
6. Add the beans, salt, and sugar. Stir to combine.
7. Cook the beans for 7 or 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Add the black pepper and stir once more before serving.
